Best Seller

Chilipad Dock Pro

Rapid Cooling & Warming

  • Temperature range of 55°F - 115°F
  • Chilipad Pro mattress topper with enhanced comfort & performance
  • Schedule temperature adjustments with the sleepme app or on-device controls
  • Simple to set up and 100% machine washable & dryable for easy cleaning
Shop Chilipad Dock Pro
Original

Chilipad Cube

Put Chilipad On the Map

  • Temperature range of 60°F - 115°F
  • Cool mesh mattress topper with circulating water
  • Use the included remote to adjust temperature or the on-device controls
  • Simple to set up and 100% machine washable & dryable for easy cleaning



Shop Chilipad Cube

Yes, we've thought of everything.

Simple Setup

Install in minutes. Fits mattresses 8-18 inches.

Easy to Clean & Maintain

The Chilipad is 100% machine washable and dryable.

Whisper Quiet

So quiet you'll wonder if it's on.*

No EMFs in Your Bed

The Chilipad topper has no electrical connections or wires, therefore zero EMFs (electromagnetic fields). Airplane mode reduces EMFs from the Dock Pro control unit.

Tech-Friendly

Works with Google Assistant.* We support our APIs - your device - your data. Create custom integrations with smart home systems.

Adjustable & Split Bed Compatible

WE and ME options allow you to customize your topper for your existing bed. For split beds purchase two MEs.

*Available on Chilipad Dock Pro models only

Reach your highest physical and cognitive potential with the help of cool sleep.

Chilipad Dock Pro Bed Cooling Systems

Regulate your bed's temperature from 55°F to 115°F, designed to give your body the Ideal conditions to wake up rejuvenated and energized.

Works with your current mattress

Designed to fit any type of bed, including adjustable and split beds.

Designed for one sleeper or two

Are you and your sleep partner unable to agree on a temperature? Choose from our dual-zoned (WE) option or single-zone (ME) option.

Discreet in size

The unit’s sleek design easily fits under bed frames over 6.5 inches in height or in open-back nightstands.

Temperature Controls

Easily adjust the temperature of your Chilipad using the on-device controls or in the sleepme app.

Sleep Programs

Schedule temperature adjustments with custom Sleep Programs for every day of the week with the sleepme app.

Shop Chilipad Dock Pro

Improve your sleep while you sleep


When we go to sleep, body temperature affects not only the onset of sleep but the quality and time spent in each stage.

Use our Chilipad Dock Pro to schedule personalized temperature adjustments throughout the night.

Shop Chilipad Dock Pro

We're not your typical mattress company.

Because we're not a mattress!

Don't take our word for it.

Our fans have spoken!

Shop Easy, Shop Smart

Free Shipping

Ships FREE to contiguous 48 USA-based addresses.

30-Night Sleep Trial

Try risk-free for 30 nights. If it’s not for you, return it for a full refund within 30 days of purchase.

Sleep Now, Pay Later

Enjoy 0% APR financing at checkout and pay over time with easy monthly installments. Getting the sleep you deserve has never been simpler with Shop Pay or Affirm.*

Worry-Free Protection

All new Chilipads come with a One Year Limited Warranty with the option to extend your coverage.

HSA/FSA Accepted

Pay with your pre-tax HSA or FSA funds

Rates from 0–36% APR. Payment options through Shop Pay Installments or Affirm are subject to an eligibility check and are provided by these lending partners: affirm.com/lenders. Options depend on your purchase amount, and a down payment may be required. State notices to consumers: affirm.com/licenses.
